objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM InspectionType WHERE Name IN ('In-depth', 'In-depth Follow-up', 'Pre-licensing', 'Pre-licensing Follow-up', 'Inspection Update', 'Routine', 'Routine Follow-up', 'Complaint', 'Complaint Follow-up', 'Initial', 'Initial Follow-up', 'Other', 'Request Follow-up', 'Request') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSInspectionType'

SELECT Id, Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryAuthority WHERE Name IN ('BCCDC', 'Food and Drug Regulation', 'Milk Industry Act', 'Milk Industry Standards Regulation') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryAuthority'

SELECT Id, Name, RegulatoryAuthCategory, IssuingDepartment.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryAuthorizationType WHERE IssuingDepartment.Name IN ('BCCDC') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryAuthorizationType'

SELECT Id, Name, Subject, Description, EffectiveFrom, RegulatoryAuthorityId, RegulatoryAuthority.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCode WHERE RegulatoryAuthority.Name IN ('BCCDC', 'Food and Drug Regulation', 'Milk Industry Act', 'Milk Industry Standards Regulation') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSRegulatoryCode'

SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, DataType, Criticality__c, InspectionQuestiontype__c, PHOCSParentId__c, PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentIndicatorDefinition WHERE Category__c IN ('Approved activities', 'Environmental Swabbing', 'Equipment', 'Exterior', 'Hygiene', 'Ingredients', 'Interior', 'Licensing', 'Packaging and Labelling', 'Pasteurization - General', 'Pasteurization - HTST', 'Pasteurization - UHT', 'Pasteurization - Vat/holder', 'Pest control', 'Product safety and quality', 'Product Testing', 'Programs and plans', 'Raw milk receiving', 'Sanitation') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentIndicatorDefinition' ORDER BY PHOCSParentId__c NULLS FIRST

SELECT Id, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, RegulatoryCodeId, RegulatoryCode.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM RegulatoryCodeAssessmentInd WHERE AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c IN ('Approved activities', 'Environmental Swabbing', 'Equipment', 'Exterior', 'Hygiene', 'Ingredients', 'Interior', 'Licensing', 'Packaging and Labelling', 'Pasteurization - General', 'Pasteurization - HTST', 'Pasteurization - UHT', 'Pasteurization - Vat/holder', 'Pest control', 'Product safety and quality', 'Product Testing', 'Programs and plans', 'Raw milk receiving', 'Sanitation')

SELECT Id, Name, TaskType, RecordType.DeveloperName, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskDefinition WHERE Name IN ('Approved activities', 'Environmental Swabbing', 'Equipment', 'Exterior', 'Hygiene', 'Ingredients', 'Interior', 'Licensing', 'Packaging and Labelling', 'Pasteurization - General', 'Pasteurization - HTST', 'Pasteurization - UHT', 'Pasteurization - Vat/holder', 'Pest control', 'Product safety and quality', 'Product Testing', 'Programs and plans', 'Raw milk receiving', 'Sanitation') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentTaskDefinition'

SELECT Id, AssessmentTaskDefinitionId, AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinitionId, AssessmentIndDefinition.Name, AssessmentIndDefinition.Category__c, AssessmentIndDefinition.PHOCSParentId__r.Name, CreatedDate, CreatedBy.Name, LastModifiedDate FROM AssessmentTaskIndDefinition WHERE AssessmentTaskDefinition.Name IN ('Approved activities', 'Environmental Swabbing', 'Equipment', 'Exterior', 'Hygiene', 'Ingredients', 'Interior', 'Licensing', 'Packaging and Labelling', 'Pasteurization - General', 'Pasteurization - HTST', 'Pasteurization - UHT', 'Pasteurization - Vat/holder', 'Pest control', 'Product safety and quality', 'Product Testing', 'Programs and plans', 'Raw milk receiving', 'Sanitation')
